narrative:
Circleville 3-B (precinct in Pickaway County) has 775 registered voters, with 66.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.3%, a modest Republican lean of 5.2 percentage points.
